description.ko: 투명한 유리 결정을 통과하며 찬란한 무지개와 정교한 기하학적 패턴으로 흩어져 미니멀한 공간을 수놓는 빛의 경이로운 탐험.
description.en: A breathtaking exploration of light as it passes through crystalline glass, splitting into vibrant rainbows and intricate geometric patterns that dance across a minimalist landscape.

prompt: Macro photography of light refracting through a series of geometric crystal prisms, sharp angular glass shards, brilliant rainbow spectrum dispersal, caustic light patterns dancing on a minimalist silk background, ethereal iridescent glow, high-speed photography, 8k resolution, cinematic depth of field.
